features.name: for loop with induction variable declaration
features.description: Code should include a for loop with an induction variable declared inside the for header using logic type with specific bit width
features.snippet: for (logic [1:0] i = 2'h0; i < 2'h3; i = i + 2'h1) begin end

features.name: for loop with hex constant bounds and step
features.description: Code should include a for loop where the start, end, and step values are hexadecimal constants with explicit width
features.snippet: for (logic [1:0] i = 2'h0; i < 2'h3; i = i + 2'h1) begin end

features.name: array element assignment via induction variable index
features.description: Code should include an assignment to an unpacked array element where the index is a for loop induction variable

features.name: macro reference in expression
features.description: Code should include a macro reference used as an expression value in an assignment or operation
